The '''Aerie Casino''' was an exorbitant hotel and gambling arena located in the artists' colony of [[Moenia/Legends|Moenia]] on planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. It was first established shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. In order to celebrate the casino's [[Aerie Casino opening|grand opening]], a large festival was held within an outdoor stadium, consisting of a series of ruthless animal-fight competitions. Creatures from a wide array of worlds were set against animals from the same geographical location. Such beasts included [[borgle bat]]s, [[flit]] harassers, [[malkloc]]s, [[Womp rat/Legends|womp rats]], [[wrix]]es, [[Squall (species)|squalls]] and [[zucca boar]]s. A [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] named [[Eban Trey]] hosted the spectacle and took great pride in welcoming everyone to the Aerie Casino.<ref name="Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine">[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]</ref>

The opulent casino showroom of the Aerie provided for the most popular games of chance, exhibiting [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] tables, [[Lugjack/Legends|lugjack]] machines and spinner-pit wheels. Guests from all across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] came to the Aerie in the hopes of finding their fortune.<ref name="Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine" />

The Imperial bioengineers [[Tendau Nandon]] and [[Dusque Mistflier]] attended the gala, and it was here that Dusque first met the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative [[Finn Darktrin]]. It was also around this time that she met the dashing gambler known as [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].<ref name="Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine" />
